---
title: "Chapter NN Summary: <title>"
author: "<your name>"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## Chapter topics

<!-- What is this chapter about, in your own words? -->

## My work

<!-- What did you do with this chapter? -->

## What I learned

<!-- What do you understand now that you didn't before, about the ideas in the chapter and about the tools you used? -->

## Open questions

<!-- What still puzzles you, or feels unresolved? -->
